title: Funky Molten Ukrainian Crowd-Pleaser Bowl
description: A flavorful and comforting Ukrainian dish featuring cumin seeds, served in a dolsot stone bowl. This recipe is Jain-friendly and perfect for a crowd.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin seeds and caraway seeds and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cabbage, carrots, and potatoes and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, tomato paste, and chopped onion. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a dolsot stone bowl.
Top the bowl with a dollop of sour cream.
Use a sous-vide machine to cook the cumin seeds and caraway seeds at 180F for 30 minutes.
Strain the cumin seeds and caraway seeds and sprinkle over the top of the bowl.
